text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of a computer or machine to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. This includes learning, reasoning, and problem-solving. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers improve their performance by analyzing data without being explicitly programmed for each task. Deep learning, a more advanced type of machine learning, uses artificial neural networks to process complex information like images and speech. Today, AI is already part of our daily lives. It helps us with voice assistants, recommends what to watch online, recognizes faces in photos, and even assists doctors in diagnosing diseases.
